question_text: Two independent random samples, each of size 7, from two populations yield the following values: Population 1 Population 2 If Mann-Whitney 𝑈 test is performed at 5% level of significance to test the null hypothesis 𝐻଴: Distributions of the populations are same, against the alternative hypothesis 𝐻ଵ: Distributions of the populations are not same, then the value of the test statistic 𝑈 (in integer) for the given data, is ______
